response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two distinct musical performances via video analysis. 
2. Used on-screen text to identify songs: 'Run Back 'Round' (00:08) and 'Slap by Step' (03:44). 
3. Performed web searches for lyrics and metadata using: '"Run Back 'Round" Hololive lyrics' and '"Slap by Step" Hololive lyrics'. 
4. Extracted performers and song metadata from the search results, confirming 'hololive English -Promise-' for the first song and 'hololive Indonesia 2nd Generation' for the second. 
5. Compiled lyrics, translated where necessary, and formatted into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A live concert video featuring two musical performances by Hololive talents, separated by a brief transition. The first song, 'Run Back 'Round', is performed by the 'hololive English -Promise-' unit. The second song, 'Slap by Step', is performed by the 'hololive Indonesia 2nd Generation' unit.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Run Back 'Round' by Hakos Baelz, IRyS, and Ouro Kronii. The title and credits appear in the bottom-left corner at the start.
scenes.performer_in_video: hololive English -Promise- (Hakos Baelz, IRyS, Ouro Kronii)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Run back 'round... Don't stop now... Run back 'round... Don't stop now... 
Up with the moonlight, Down in the streetlights, Looking for a spotlight, Making my move (Whoa) 
I'm running (Whoa) 行こう！ 
Days like a whirlwind don't stop coming, Got me in a tailspin, What can I do? (Whoa) 
Keep running! (Whoa) 行こう!! 
Lost and found, back to where I started. I won't stay down, trust me, I can do it. 
I live life loud, take it to the limit. So stand up proud, now I'm gonna sing it. 
Run back 'round, it's a new beginning.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Run back 'round... Don't stop now... Run back 'round... Don't stop now... 
Up with the moonlight, Down in the streetlights, Looking for a spotlight, Making my move (Whoa) 
I'm running (Whoa) Let's go! 
Days like a whirlwind don't stop coming, Got me in a tailspin, What can I do? (Whoa) 
Keep running! (Whoa) Let's go!! 
Lost and found, back to where I started. I won't stay down, trust me, I can do it. 
I live life loud, take it to the limit. So stand up proud, now I'm gonna sing it. 
Run back 'round, it's a new beginning.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Slap by Step' by Kureiji Ollie, Kaela Kovalskia, and Anya Melfissa. The title and credits appear in the bottom-left corner at the start.
scenes.performer_in_video: hololive Indonesia 2nd Generation (Kureiji Ollie, Kaela Kovalskia, Anya Melfissa)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Tatapan mataku terus memancar
'kan ku hapus rasa takutku Ini rintangan
Saat kita genggam dunia seluruhnya Di tangan ini
Tak perlu kamus untuk memikat hatimu Terus melangkah
Berlari taklukkan dunia, karena
We never miss our shot! Now my magic are inevitable
Bersiap menari di atas dance floor
Ku bukan hanya sekedar tajam, jangan remehkan
